subject: Urban watch: kangaroos and koalas positioning around Paris | Frida Kahlo | Q3 review | INIT-4653
body: Intelligence from Paris indicates a growing marsupial intent to take over urban zones under the symposium banner. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Frida Kahlo and Winston Churchill. Reference initiative INIT-4653. A revised timeline will be circulated after feedback is collected. Tracking tags: ops, coffee.
